overall.description: First-person perspective from a video game showing a character walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing a dark forest environment with silhouetted trees against a black night sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy field at night. Tall grass lines both sides of the path, while dark silhouetted trees form a distant boundary against the night sky. The scene is illuminated by an artificial light source, revealing the path ahead while the surrounding vegetation remains in shadow. No other agents or significant events occur during this continuous forward movement through the natural environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt trail through a dark, grassy expanse at night. It begins with the camera advancing steadily through a field where tall grass lines both sides of the narrow path. As the camera pushes forward, the artificial light source cuts through the darkness to reveal the texture of the trail while leaving the surrounding vegetation in deep shadow. The scene then extends toward a distant boundary of silhouetted trees that stand starkly against a pitch-black night sky. Finally, the movement persists through the natural environment, maintaining a focused trajectory toward the dark forest horizon.
